# DATPAQ WHOIS Domain Lookup Sample

This repository contains a production-ready single-page application demonstrating the DATPAQ WHOIS Domain Lookup API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://www.datpaq.com/docs/whois
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: /v1/whois/lookup
- OpenAI machine-readable docs: /openai.json
- OpenAPI schema: /openapi.json
- Expanded LLM guidance: /llms-full.txt

## What this app demonstrates
- Single WHOIS lookup using a domain string.
- Batch WHOIS lookup using comma-separated domains.
- Request validation for required values (API key and domain).
- Loading, error, and success response handling.
- Copyable request URL and JSON response output.

## Auth expectations
- The user supplies an API key at runtime.
- The sample sends the key with the shared client header and mirrors it in the `api_key` query param for WHOIS route compatibility.

## Query contract (GET /v1/whois/lookup)
- Required: `domain`
- `domain` accepts either one hostname or a comma-separated batch up to 50 domains.
- The request URL shown in the UI also includes `api_key` so the copied URL is directly runnable.

## Output contract
- Successful responses return either one lookup object or an array of lookup objects.
- Common success fields include `domain`, `tld`, `registrar`, `creationDate`, `expirationDate`, `nameServers`, and `raw`.
- Failed lookup objects can include `error`, `details`, and `correlationId`.
